title: rhinanthus antiquus
intro: Rhinanthus antiquus, also known as Yellow Rattle, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Orobanchaceae family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Rhinanthus antiquus is valued for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, making it beneficial for respiratory issues and joint pain. The plant's extracts have been used to relieve bronchitis, asthma, and other breathing disorders, while also showing potential in reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Rhinanthus antiquus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder for medicinal use, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
